data.Content:
I have thoroughly reviewed the provided diff for task 069 (grapheme-aware cell storage). The implementation correctly adds multi-codepoint support without regressing the compact ASCII path or increasing the `Cell` size, efficiently using `Arc::make_mut` and copy-on-write semantics.

The edge cases around cursor anchors, width expansions, ESC dispatch anchor clearing, zero-width scalars, RI pairs, and ZWJ expansions are all handled robustly. The `preceding_cell_position()` and `active_grapheme_cell` management handle line wraps, scroll boundaries, styling isolation, and wide-cell invariants seamlessly.

APPROVE
